title: Split integration.x in dedicated XD projects where appropriate
description: Similar to what is done for e.g. hadoop, reactor, and http, some of the classes in the .x package (namely gemfire, splunk, twitter) should go in dedicated (albeit small) projects. This would enable further modularization (see XD-915)

title: Dynamic router should allow to discard messages
description: Currently dynamic router sink has to return a valid queue name. This is problematic when the message should be discarded as part of the routing process. In this case one have to define a stream with {{filter | router}} steps where part of the SpEL is duplicated between {{filter}} and {{router}} modules.    Instead the dynamic router should allow to return null to discard the message and stop further processing. Spring Integration is already providing {{resolution-required}} attribute on {{<router/>}}.

title: Modules do not redeploy properly when Zookeeper node is lost.

title: Add support to test XD on YARN in EC2
description: As a developer, I'd like to have acceptance test coverage for XD + YARN on EC2 so that I can verify simple XD features running on YARN on every build cycle.
